agency_tasks.title: Add UTM parameters to all active Meta ads
agency_tasks.detail: Agency confirmed they're adding this today (Jun 25). Use at ad level: utm_source=facebook&utm_medium=paid&utm_campaign={{campaign.name}}&utm_content={{ad.name}} — gives clean source/medium in GA4 + Shopify reporting.

agency_tasks.title: Fix or pause the French landing page
agency_tasks.detail: This is the real lever. /fr/menteurs-pirates-grand-boite converts at 0.28–0.54% vs 3%+ for English — over 90 days that's 1,085 sessions of mostly paid traffic barely selling. Audit translation, pricing, shipping copy, FR checkout. Decide: fix or pause FR/IT spend until fixed.

agency_tasks.title: Add Conversions API (CAPI) to tap10game.com
agency_tasks.detail: Agency confirmed the Lead event fires, but flagged tap10 is a manual browser-pixel only — no server-side CAPI. For a paid-traffic lead page that's worth closing. Bengt can wire server-side Lead events (the page is ours, not Shopify).

agency_tasks.title: Provide Microsoft Clarity project for tap10game.com
agency_tasks.detail: Clarity is live on nordicpirates.com (ID wuzvreap5g). Create / share a Clarity project ID for tap10game.com and we'll wire the (consent-gated) snippet to watch signup behaviour.

agency_tasks.title: Confirm retargeting audiences are populating
agency_tasks.detail: Tracking is healthy (Purchase EMQ 8.6), so website-visitor / purchaser audiences should be filling. Quick confirm they're at expected size and being used in the funnel.

agency_tasks.title: Rename the main pixel (cosmetic)
agency_tasks.detail: Pixel 832599113757136 is still named 'Main - lyingpirates.com Pixel' from the old domain. Rename to 'nordicpirates.com' so the account is unambiguous. No functional impact.
